name: Claw Mafia Finance
description: Structured equity research, backtesting, and paper trading tools for options-based strategies.

alpacaApiKey.description: Alpaca API key for market data and paper trading

ibkrPort.description: IBKR IB Gateway TWS API port (default: 4000)

ibkrFlexToken.description: IBKR Flex Web Service token (from IBKR_FLEX_TOKEN) for fetching paper-trade/position Flex reports

ibkrFlexQueryId.description: Default IBKR Flex query id (from IBKR_FLEX_QUERY_ID) used when no query_id is passed

fredApiKey.description: FRED API key for economic data

paperAccountCapital.description: Initial paper trading capital in USD

ibkrHost.label: IBKR Gateway Host
ibkrHost.help: Hostname of the IB Gateway (default: localhost)

ibkrPort.label: IBKR Gateway Port
ibkrPort.help: TWS API port of the IB Gateway (default: 4000)

ibkrFlexToken.label: IBKR Flex Token
ibkrFlexToken.help: IBKR Flex Web Service token; enables paper-trade and position report fetches

ibkrFlexQueryId.label: IBKR Flex Query ID
ibkrFlexQueryId.help: Default Flex query id to run when none is supplied

dataDir.label: Data Directory
dataDir.help: Local path for caching market data files

ledgerDbPath.label: Ledger DB Path
ledgerDbPath.help: SQLite file for the trading-journal ledger (defaults to the plugin state dir)

paperAccountCapital.label: Paper Account Capital
paperAccountCapital.help: Starting capital for paper trading account (USD)
